title_font_status: LUXURY word = Libre Caslon Display (display serif, category-correct); the type word = Great Vibes (seeded OFL script) to replicate the Canva source's script accent. Exact Canva faces unconfirmed (needs_seed) but the STYLE now matches (serif + script).
_note: #3 (Luxury Property = Canva page 3 'LUXURY Villa'). FAITHFUL REPLICATION: the baked source composition (full-dark photo background + baked rounded stat box + icons) is kept; only the dynamic text is knocked out and redrawn EDITABLE at the same positions/style — NOT redesigned. NO manifest overlay (the source already bakes the dark overlay). Title = 'LUXURY' (serif) + {Type} in SCRIPT (Great Vibes, seeded) overlapping to the right, matching the source. Centered uppercase subtitle. 3-stat row inside the baked rounded box (house/bed/bath icons kept — universally correct). Website centered at bottom. Colours are role tokens (agency wheel); default cream to match the source's white monochrome. No invented facts: title type + stats are real; subtitle is template marketing copy with real type/city; website is agency copy. Missing facts hide their slot.

text_slots.text:
THIS BRAND-NEW LUXURY HOME IS NOW AVAILABLE
AND OFFERS EVERYTHING YOU NEED FOR A STYLISH,
COMFORTABLE, AND CONVENIENT LIFESTYLE.
